item.title: Rescuers in Brazil pulled an injured jaguar from the Rio Negro after finding it struggling to stay afloat with gunshot wounds. ⁣ ⁣ The big cat is now receiving care from wildlife specialists.
item.dc:creator: Conothout

item.title: Fresh FRIDAY Meme Dump for your Coffee #751 (it's important to end the week right)
item.description:
1. So these people pretty much disregard any kind of sources that isn't their conspiracy buddies? What kind of a way to live is this?
2. "Come on, I have places to be!!!"
3. Yap, just like Michael Jackson
4. This truck should be there for every one of us in our greatest moments
5. Excuse me, do you have a moment to talk
6. Bank teller laughs at a man trying to rob a bank with a meat cleaver
7
8
9
10
11. Worthy life advice for everyone to remember
12
13. Cat having its own adventures
14. Just here for a trim, buddy
15. Thanks for making it till the end of the dump! Finally I like to share a game I'm currently making - a moral choice simulator based on a mix of The Milgram Experiment and The Trolley Problem. I'm hoping to make players have life long psychological trauma after playing it. Is that an ambitious goal to have? Anyway, if you like my dumps and want to support my work, a wishlist would help a lot: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Your grandpa-esque pal. GRANDPA FFS
item.description: Could have said "handsome." Just as easy to write the word "handsome" as "grandpa-esque". Anyway, they did a nice interview with your freaking GRANDPA over on GoComics here: https://www.gocomics.com/extras/jim-benton-its-happy-bunny?fbclid=IwY2xjawNUxA5leHRuA2FlbQIxMQABHkBV8b5lXOGKZtBFNNRepPYdYanGZTKPBsdjRK8MQPxturTAXhRl4j4mrVB4_aem_m7i-byDRKDI7BRk0po_kZQ
item.dc:creator: JKBenton

item.title: Chicago vs 47th regime
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: GovBrief #251
item.description: ? Trump removed his mask yesterday when he told a meeting room that he "took the freedom of speech away." You can watch the video. It's not a slip or anyone spinning a story. He bragged and tried to justify it. The USA is now an authoritarian regime. Trump also wrote that the Illinois governor and Chicago mayor should be in jail for "failing to protect ICE." The military has killed at least 21 people in the Caribbean without trial or evidence. Librarians in Hawaii and Wyoming have been under attack. In Texas, the GOP is meeting this weekend to consider blocking 10 of its own members from the ballot for not being conservative enough. This is not a drill. The country is on fire. We're numb to outrages that would have paralyzed the country six months ago. Please spread the word to the people who aren't paying attention. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-agents-assigned-immigration [2] https://go.govbrief.today/oregon-guard-ruling-appeal [3] https://go.govbrief.today/hawaii-book-display-censored [4] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-kirk-300-investigations [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-free-speech-taken-away [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-jail-pritzker-johnson [7] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-gop-primary-censure [8] https://go.govbrief.today/us-destroyed-colombian-boat [9] https://go.govbrief.today/un-peackeeping-funding-crisis [10] https://go.govbrief.today/israel-hamas-phase-one [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-generic-drug-tariffs [12] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-trump-boat-strikes [13] https://go.govbrief.today/comey-pleads-not-guilty [14] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-fires-three-more [15] https://go.govbrief.today/palisades-fire-arrest [16] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-furlough-backpay-messages [17] https://go.govbrief.today/irs-shutdown-crisis-furloughs [18] https://go.govbrief.today/wyoming-librarian-receives-settlement [19] https://go.govbrief.today/cards-humanity-tariff-hack Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Hey, Imgur, IMPORTANT REMINDER - I can see messages sent to me, but I am still not permitted to use chat so I can't message back. I know a couple of you have tried to reach me, and I would love to respond. Please email me at info at govbrief dot today, and I will be happy to. See y'all later tonight.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.123 MORE THAN MEETS THE EYES
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Todd Ferguson So, I'm an aficionado (nerd) about many things in Pop Culture, but Gen 1 Transformers probably sit amongst the top of the list of things I am unapologetically dorky about. Enjoy.
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] The Touch - Stan Bush YouTube: https://youtu.be/A52--FKUQgU?si=kUSE8MgOlGVouah3 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2QyGSbGdT9suKuDKwnjwH9?si=65a59ef755a044f1
Marion Wood
Colin Searle
Tood Ferguson
Artist, i.am.p. did a fun little series of He-Man / TF crossover drawings that caught my eye.
Shannon B
Ashleigh Phillips
David Nakayama
Gyaro 88
FUN FACT: GoBots are now considered part of the Transformers universe, as Hasbro, the company that owns the rights to the GoBots, has incorporated them into the Transformers continuity, with characters like Bug Bite and Crasher appearing in new Transformers toy lines and comic series. This integration was established after Hasbro acquired the GoBots' owner, Tonka, in 1991. A 2019 IDW and Hasbro mini-series introduced the GoBots into the Transformers universe, reimagining their origins as part of that continuity.
Muhd Zaki
Nicodemus Holroyd
Todd Ferguson
Jaimee D. Santos
James Daly
James Daly
Jay Baines
Jetstorm Sifuen
Jetstorm Sifuen
markerguru
novanim
novanim
iggwilv_dk
David Larrea
James Daly
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
